song.title: Come Now is the Time to Worship
song.author: Brian Doerkson
song.lyrics:
[C] . D Dsus D Come, now is the time to worship. .A Em7 G Come, now is the time To give your heart; .D Dsus D Come, just as you are to worship; .A Em7 G D Come, just as you are Before your God, come.
[V1]
.A E One day every tongue will confess You are God. .A E One day every knee will bow. .A C#m Still the greatest treasure remains . A B For those who gladly choose You now.
[V2] Willingly we choose to surrender our lives; Willingly our knees will bow; With all our heart, soul, mind and strength we gladly choose You now
